◎译　　名　和平的盛会 / Oh Sports, You Are Peace!
◎片　　名　О спорт! Ты - мир!
◎年　　代　1981
◎产　　地　苏联
◎类　　别　纪录片 / 运动
◎语　　言　俄语
◎IMDb评分  7.0/10 from 109 users
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0151789/
◎豆瓣评分　0/10 from 0 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/24842936/
◎片　　长　149分钟
◎导　　演　尤里·奥泽洛夫 Yuri Ozerov / 鲍里斯·里奇科夫 Boris Rychkov

◎简　　介  

　　A documentary about the 1980 Moscow Olympics with animation fragments. The intense dynamic film filled with thrilling sports events, seen through the eyes of the participants and the viewers, ends with touching shots of parting with the Olympic symbol.
